docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT DENEWETH, LEN JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN VP TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LEN JOHN DENEWETH IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DENEWETH, LEN JOHN $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,635.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $85.00 SERVED JUL-07-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DENEWETH, LEN JOHN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DAN SCANLAN, VP TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN
